section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports shortness of breath.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Shortness of breath is documented explicitly as a patient report rather than an observed exam or test result, so it belongs in the history of present illness rather than findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports urinating at night.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Nocturia is described as a patient-reported symptom, which fits the history of present illness rather than the findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports shortness of breath.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This second instance is again a patient-reported symptom and should be in the history of present illness, not in findings.
